description: Default decorator pipeline applied to files before AES encryption.
comment: Steps are applied in ORDER: first step executes first, last step executes last. Decryption applies them in REVERSE order automatically.

available_steps.COMPRESS: Deflate-compresses bytes before encryption (saves space + increases entropy)
available_steps.AES: AES-256-GCM encryption (always present in a real pipeline)
available_steps.CHECKSUM: Appends SHA-256 checksum for integrity verification
available_steps.XOR: XOR byte transformation (demo only — illustrates Strategy Pattern)
